footer.vision:
Creating Willful Challenges.
Creating Globally Competitive Businesses.

hero.title: TRY to
hero.subtitle: Creating a Culture of Challenge.
description: Fusing the latest technology with overwhelming execution power
We go beyond the traditional advisory framework,
taking risks ourselves to manifest every challenge
as a next-generation business operating company.

whoWeAre.description:
We are not merely external advisors.
In addition to consulting fee-based contracts, we take business risks ourselves,
committing to results on the same level as our clients through revenue-share models and business investments.

This is exactly why our consulting embodies an overwhelming sense of ownership and real-world expertise gained from actual execution.
We do not offer "advice from those who have never done it," but rather "proposals from those who run businesses themselves".
This is our definitive value that completely sets us apart from ordinary consulting firms.

Today, as a true business operating company directly committed to the growth of our own businesses and investments, we generate new challenges every single day.

advisory.title: ADVISORY
advisory.desc:
Highly specialized intellectual services solving domestic and global business challenges.
We provide the foundational knowledge for every challenge, from M&A to corporate turnaround.

investment.title: INVESTMENT & OPERATION
investment.desc:
Investing our own capital and driving business through a hands-on approach.
We directly increase corporate value through the management of PE/PIPES/Infrastructure funds and principal investments.

ourPhilosophy.headline: Creating Willful Challenges.
ourPhilosophy.description:
We not only support the serious challenges of our clients but also possess a firm will ourselves, continuously acting as front-line "challengers" harder than anyone else.


Together with client business leaders, we Envision—painting an even higher vision and redefining the summit to aim for.
We then directly supplement the "missing parts" (capital, talent, technology, networks, etc.) essential for its realization, empowering them to pursue unprecedented scale in business growth.

trackRecord.description:
Over 14 years since our founding, we have covered a wide range of fields including strategic advisory, M&A advisory, expansion support to 58 countries worldwide, new business planning, DX/AI support, executive search, and cost reduction consulting.
Our track record of over 1,000 projects proves the overwhelming driving force of our hybrid model.

records.label: Total Portfolio Market Cap
records.description: Achieving overwhelming growth and value creation for consulting and portfolio companies.

records.label: Unicorn Creation
records.description: Nurtured into a unicorn company valued at over $1 billion through our consulting.

records.label: Infrastructure Fund
records.description: Total AUM in energy projects supporting social infrastructure globally and domestically.

records.label: PE/PIPES Fund
records.description: Managing growth and buyout investment funds for listed and unlisted companies.

uniqueValueProposition.description: Overwhelming execution power and commitment that sets us apart from ordinary consulting firms and investment funds.

cards.title: Taking 'Risk' as a Principal
cards.description: Going beyond standard advisory (fee-based business), we execute principal investments and revenue sharing ourselves. We commit to results directly, not as advisors, but as 'co-founders'.

cards.title: Powerful 'Missing Part' Supplementation
cards.description: We possess in-house capabilities to comprehensively procure and provide the resources missing for corporate growth—funding, management talent dispatch, global network access, DX/AI technology, and M&A execution. Rather than mere introductions, our professional group enters the field directly to fill the missing pieces and lead the business to completion.

details.value: Direct funding via fund management and principal investment
Immediate assignment of CxO-class management talent
Creating business opportunities using alliances in 58 countries
Design and implementation support for DX/AI and digital transformation

cards.title: A 'Powerful Network' Connecting the World
cards.description: Alliances and information networks spanning over 58 countries globally. We fully leverage these to discover and manifest opportunities for cross-border business growth. It is our unique foundation to realize global value-ups for both portfolios and clients.

valuesStrength.headline:
3 Value Behaviors
To Grow Businesses Together
valuesStrength.description: We are not merely external advisors. We share risks with our clients and commit to maximizing business value with an overwhelming sense of ownership.

cards.title:
Pioneering Business Opportunities
on a Global Standard
cards.description: With a global perspective, we discover and realize opportunities for cross-border business growth.

cards.title:
Challenging Beyond Boundaries
and Executing as Principals
cards.description: Unconstrained by precedents or existing frameworks, we run alongside you to business success with a strong sense of ownership.

cards.title:
Aiming for Uncharted Heights
Through Teamwork
cards.description: Diverse professionals gather to produce overwhelming results that transcend the simple addition of individuals.

services.headline: 3 Pillars Driving Business and<br className="md:hidden" />Shaping Challenges
